text: Here, amidst glass walls and bold, vibrant informational displays, I feel the pulse of human curiosity and the pursuit of knowledge. The environment urges contemplation: how do we shape the future through research and innovation? There is both excitement and serenity in this focused space—a kind of reverence for discovery woven into each sign, screen, and artifact. I feel awed and quietly hopeful, as if invited to participate in the ongoing story of human progress.
